title: GenomeLens 共线性图 (Synteny Figure)
description: 用于绘制基因级或区段级双物种共线性图，突出展示成对保守基因、顺序变化和局部结构差异。它比点图更强调具体基因与片段之间的对应关系，适合论文正文或补充图展示。
description_en: Draws gene-level or region-level synteny figures for two species, highlighting conserved gene pairs, order changes, and local structural differences. Compared with a dotplot, it emphasizes explicit gene and segment correspondence and is well suited for main-text or supplementary figures.
context: 双物种基因级共线性关系与局部结构展示。
context_en: Gene-level syntenic relationships and local structural display for two species.

params.label: 输入目录
params.description: 包含两物种注释与序列文件的目录，用于构建基因轨道、顺序与物种背景。
params.description_en: Directory containing the annotation and sequence files for both species, used to build gene tracks, ordering, and species context.

params.label: Blocks 文件
params.description: 双物种共线性区块文件，决定图中哪些片段与基因需要建立对应关系并参与连线。
params.description_en: Pairwise synteny blocks file defining which segments and genes should be connected in the figure.

params.label: Layout 文件
params.description: 可选布局文件，用于手动指定轨道顺序、方向或版式；不提供时使用默认布局。
params.description_en: Optional layout file for manually specifying track order, orientation, or panel arrangement; the default layout is used when omitted.

params.label: 输出目录
params.description: 共线性图输出目录。这里通常会生成适合正文或补充材料展示的双物种共线性图件。
params.description_en: Output directory for synteny figures. This usually contains pairwise synteny figures suitable for main-text or supplementary presentation.

params.label: 基因形状
params.description: 图中基因块的绘制样式。箭头更强调方向性，方框则更简洁，适合信息密度较高的图面。
params.description_en: Drawing style of gene glyphs in the figure. Arrows emphasize directionality, whereas boxes are cleaner for figures with high information density.

params.label: 基因着色
params.description: 基因颜色的分配方式。可用于突出方向差异，也可用于强调同源组归属。
params.description_en: How colors are assigned to genes. This can be used either to highlight orientation differences or to emphasize orthogroup membership.

params.label: 连线样式
params.description: 基因间共线性连接的绘制风格。曲线通常更柔和易读，直线更利于强调直接对应关系。
params.description_en: Drawing style of syntenic connections between genes. Curves are usually smoother and easier to read, while straight lines emphasize direct correspondence.

params.label: 画布尺寸
params.description: 共线性图画布尺寸，例如 `10x5`。在轨道较多、标签较密或需要排版适配时可手动设定。
params.description_en: Figure size for the synteny figure, for example `10x5`. This can be set manually when many tracks are present, labels are dense, or specific layout fitting is needed.

params.label: 分辨率
params.description: 共线性图的栅格输出分辨率，更高的 DPI 更利于保留细粒度基因与连线细节。
params.description_en: Raster output resolution for the synteny figure. Higher DPI helps preserve fine-grained gene and link details.

params.label: 输出格式
params.description: 共线性图输出格式。若希望后续继续精修图件，建议优先使用矢量格式。
params.description_en: Output format for the synteny figure. Vector formats are recommended if further figure polishing is expected.
